mapper.update: create table if not exists zephyr_mcp_servers ( id varchar(64) primary key, user_name varchar(64) not null, name varchar(128) not null, transport varchar(16) not null, command varchar(256), args text, env_vars text, url varchar(512), headers text, status varchar(16) default 'disconnected', scope varchar(16) default 'user', created_at bigint, updated_at bigint ); create index if not exists idx_zephyr_ms_user on zephyr_mcp_servers(user_name);
